name: Cloud Dissolve
description: Atmospheric texture evaporating into clear sky

prompts.label: ambient cloud texture dissolving into clear open sky
prompts.text: ambient cloud texture dissolving into clear open sky, cathedral reverb at midnight, bowed singing bowl overtone, warm fog dissolving slowly, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, with natural decay

prompts.label: atmospheric pad evaporating with gentle warmth
prompts.text: atmospheric pad evaporating with gentle warmth, tape-saturated warmth, granular piano cloud, candlelight flickering softly, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, wide, smooth fade out

prompts.label: foggy drone clearing to reveal pristine silence
prompts.text: foggy drone clearing to reveal pristine silence, Brian Eno infinite space, reversed cymbal swell, underwater weightlessness, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, sustained resonance

prompts.label: misty reverb wash thinning to transparent air
prompts.text: misty reverb wash thinning to transparent air, abandoned hall echo, harmonium drone with tape wobble, drifting between sleep and waking, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, wide, with natural decay

prompts.label: vapor trail shimmer dissipating into sunlight
prompts.text: vapor trail shimmer dissipating into sunlight, lo-fi cassette hiss and bloom, shimmer reverb pad wash, moonlight through frosted glass, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, smooth fade out
